hero.name: Wafiy
hero.bio: Junior Software Engineer with 1.5 years building production-grade full-stack apps, focused on backend and microservices. I enjoy shipping clean, reliable software — from REST APIs to real-time AI systems.

experiences.description: Building production microservices for AI-powered conversational platforms — real-time chat widgets with WebRTC, enterprise AI with SSE streaming and GCP Pub/Sub, and distributed tracing via OpenTelemetry.
Built internal modules for an EPC client's Management of Change system and contributed to a document management migration from EDMS to EDCS.

projects.title: Bilku
projects.description: Personal bill and financial commitment tracker with PWA support for mobile access.

projects.title: Family Management System
projects.description: Final year project — a collaborative family management web app with JWT auth and priority-based alerts via scheduled Cron jobs.
